title: Caramelize Mexican Poblano Stir-fry
description: A herbal and juicy monsoon-inspired dish featuring a keto-friendly caramelized poblano pepper with a touch of plain flour for added texture.
instructions: Clean and stem the poblano peppers. Cut them in half lengthwise.
In a small bowl, mix olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, seasoning blend, salt, and pepper. Brush this mixture all over the cut halves of the poblano peppers inside and outside.
Place the stuffed poblano peppers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20-25 minutes or until charred and tender.
While baking, in a small saucepan, whisk together plain flour and lemon juice to form a smooth paste. Pour in olive oil and continue to stir until it thickens into a caramel-like consistency.
Once the peppers are ready, carefully remove from the oven and let them cool slightly. Slice them open, sprinkle with caramelized flour mixture, ensuring every slice is coated evenly.
Serve hot as an appetizer or side dish.
